name: click2026
description: Click2026 — color clicking puzzle with a WebAssembly analysis engine
author: Hrvoje Abraham <ahrvoje@gmail.com>

scripts.build:engine:primary: asc asm/engine.ts --outFile src/scripts/engine/engine.wasm --runtime stub --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 0 --noAssert --enable simd --use ENGINE_LITE=0 && asc asm/engine.ts --outFile src/scripts/engine/engine-scalar.wasm --runtime stub --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 0 --noAssert --use ENGINE_LITE=0
scripts.build:engine:lanes: asc asm/engine.ts --outFile src/scripts/engine/engine-lane.wasm --runtime stub --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 0 --noAssert --enable simd --use ENGINE_LITE=1 && asc asm/engine.ts --outFile src/scripts/engine/engine-lane-scalar.wasm --runtime stub --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 0 --noAssert --use ENGINE_LITE=1
scripts.build:engine: npm run build:engine:primary && npm run build:engine:lanes
scripts.test:engine: npm run build:engine && node tools/engine.pool.test.mjs && node tools/gpu.test.mjs && node tools/gpu.kernel.test.mjs && node tools/settings.test.mjs && node tools/engine.test.mjs
